note: Layout: recto: 11 long lines above the fold, 4 short lines perpendicular with direction; verso: 4 lines of verification plus signatures|Script: Cortesana in brown ink|signed Fernán d'Alva|Royal Decree issued to Diego López de Haro Governor and Chief Justice of Galicia by Ferdinand and Isabella in April 1486 regarding handing over the fortaleza de castro that he held and following all directives given by Alonso de Quintanilla, the comptroller, who accompanied the letter and was acting on the sovereigns' behalf.
